rulings.Case Title: ANITA B. YOUNGBLOOD DDS VS. MICHAEL CRESCI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 06, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT MICHAEL CRESCI, R-MAC & ASSOCIATES, INC.'s MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT Denied. Moving party failed to show diligence is seeking setting aside the default and default judgment (CCP 473(b)) and failed to show reasonable reliance per Fasuyi.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BISHOP DONALD PIPKINS, AN INDIVIDUAL et al VS. HOMEQ CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 06, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT BARCLAY CAPITAL REAL ESTATE INC's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained without leave to amend all of causes of action alleged in TAC proposed in opposition are barred by collateral estoppel.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: J&R SAN FRANCISCO, INC. et al VS. CHO QUON FUNG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Meredith Fondahl'S Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Plaintiff J& R San Francisco Inc'S Claim Against Defendant Meredith Fondahl
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 06, 2013, line 3. Defendant Meredith Fondahl'S Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Plaintiff J& R San Francisco Inc'S Claim Against Defendant Meredith Fondahl DENIED. J&R is not a party to the arbitration agreement. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CLINTON WILLIAMS et al VS. JOHN STEWART COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 06, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to the second paragraph of the first cause of action is overruled. Moving party provides no authority for demurrer to a portion of a cause of action. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to the second cause of action for Plaintiff to separately allege its intentional torts and to allege all elements of such torts. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CLINTON WILLIAMS et al VS. JOHN STEWART COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 06, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED, no opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. DENINE LOGAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Against San Francisco Authority
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 6, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT DENINE LOGAN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Against San Francisco Authority Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GENEVA TERRACE PROPERTY OWNERS ASSOCIATION, INC. VS. WEDGEWOOD, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 6, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANTS JESSICA SOMEN and GRANITE RANCH OPPORTUNITIES LLC's Demurrer To Plaintiff's Complaint Overruled, 5 days to answer. Moving party failed to provide courtesy copy of the Request for Judicial Notice. Complaint is sufficient on its face. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 363 VALENCIA LLC VS. HANIEL OLIVERA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 6, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT HANIEL OLIVERA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend. Non-opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AMI QI VS. VICTOR TUNG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 6, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT VICTOR TUNG and RONG HU's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained. The action is abated until CUD-13-646519 is resolved. CCP 1047 provides for successive actions upon the same contract, it does not authorize successive actions where the only issue per CCP 1159 et seq. is possession. = (501/REQ)
